title: Ask Friends
description: This mod contains a few blocks and items, which i made from things my friends said
body:
# Ask Friends ask friends is a mod where I added the answers that my friends said when I ask could you say a random thing/object Thanks to my friends for giving me the ideas **yes i know the recipies aren't acurate to the real world, it's a mod for fun not for accuracy** ## Items:
Spoiler Items: - Batch 1

Butterfly: ![Butterfly](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8NYfIDGw/images/5aa11ad6bd6535fd1649d19b1bb8ea82c57d2b08.png) Cantaloupe: ![Cantaloupe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8NYfIDGw/images/ce8f5549f02aaf6f4faaf900fc701cdbad75eea0.png) Coffee: ![Coffee](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8NYfIDGw/images/4127bac0e4d49c3f8dec6f6743db05b23f8c2057.png) Cupcake: ![Cupcake](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8NYfIDGw/images/93a37117c0aa7f73830cdc3bab36d4a09a0edb05.png) Ice Cream: ![Ice Cream](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8NYfIDGw/images/7a74f9a4f6e782dd76d0f7f7e859660e4bf805d7.png) Paint Brush: ![Paint Brush](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8NYfIDGw/images/19614c272dda02ed319cab79c73aad12be744b5b.png) Phone: ![Phone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8NYfIDGw/images/3123b239cc2e0431885908478cec830ba9b51492.png) Shark: ![Shark](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8NYfIDGw/images/911c6d0c8718320a362f12fc7827c8a581dd291b.png) Squid Hat: ![Squid Hat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8NYfIDGw/images/5f8cf9709df9793d5d4ece75b09bc838c3938162.png) Sunglasses: ![Sunglasses](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8NYfIDGw/images/a44bbec325eeb29ebd42f4ea0cb01d1df6777bbb.png)
- Batch 2

Bandana: ![Bandana](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8NYfIDGw/images/ecd9ceab2c46a733bf6d90717b1abc3405512aba.png) Butter: ![Butter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8NYfIDGw/images/34f0faf589ec28131101f614da1bce45c5303495.png) Chainsaw: ![Chainsaw](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8NYfIDGw/images/3264c5e6ad87dada37aa20530e48bbc8a328b1e7.png) Mango: ![Mango](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8NYfIDGw/images/4274dd820234d90ed8d85bbbfe4527f55d294bd5.png) Milkshake: ![Milkshake](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8NYfIDGw/images/802c279a6588b27f6c6ba9d926e5192ca50473c6.png) Mug: ![Mug](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8NYfIDGw/images/50dc0f1a59d75f8f849349f8fb5289c5bfb8fffc.png) Night Vision Goggles: ![Night Vision Goggles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8NYfIDGw/images/a125448ba5d2b79b3ddf354b2221c35bcf2afc24.png) Paint Bucket: ![Paint Bucket](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8NYfIDGw/images/224e83eb135e1cd241cb4352631c73d0d3906e3d.png) Spoon: ![Spoon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8NYfIDGw/images/3a51e0cb7d4db6f1fc9701e589ebe23cd0f53981.png) TV Remote: ![TV Remote](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8NYfIDGw/images/f531a5de43bb12d6fe91094335ec0405631c41d4.png)
